name: libgnuradio-digital3.10.12
title: libgnuradio-digital3.10.12
description:
gnuradio digital communications functions
All the functions for doing digital modulation and demodulation,
including bpsk, qpsk, gmsk and ofdm signals.
Part of the main gnuradio build.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libgnuradio-digital3.10.12 because gnuradio digital communications functions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libgnuradio-digital3.10.12 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libgnuradio-digital3.10.12 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libgnuradio-digital3.10.12 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
